title: Hex Trust receives MVP Licence from Dubai's Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority
summary: On 24 November 2022, VARA -- the Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority, which regulates virtual assets across Dubai's free zones and mainland outside the Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC) -- announced that Hex Trust had received an MVP Licence. The licence lets Hex Trust provide virtual-asset custodial services, broker-dealer services and staking services to institutional clients and sophisticated investors within VARA's virtual asset service provider (VASP) framework. The announcement followed a provisional licence VARA had granted Hex Trust in June 2022, when the firm opened a Dubai office as its Middle East and North Africa regional headquarters.
why_it_matters: VARA is the primary licensing gatekeeper for virtual-asset firms operating in Dubai outside the DIFC, so an MVP Licence marks the point at which a firm can actually begin offering regulated services like custody, brokerage and staking there, rather than merely holding an earlier-stage preparatory approval.

citations.quote: the sole authority regulating virtual assets across Dubai's free zones and mainland
